title: Add minimal champion core and spell CSV artifacts
description: Generate reviewable CSV outputs from per-champion DDragon JSON with a minimal schema: champion core rows and champion spell rows.
notes: Implemented minimal CSV artifact generation for champion-core and champion-spells, added unit coverage, and verified outputs against local snapshot version 16.1.1 locale en_US.
close_reason: Completed minimal CSV artifact generation and produced reviewable outputs.

title: Formalize champion CSV artifact contract
description: Decide whether champion-core and champion-spells CSV outputs should be stable repo contracts, including delimiter conventions for array fields, output path/versioning policy, and whether to add integration coverage for real snapshot layouts.

title: Implement Java-only scaffold
description: Replace Python scaffold with Java implementation (Gradle), including CLI, normalization, mapping generation, and tests aligned to decisions.
close_reason: Java-only scaffold complete; Python removed, Gradle project with CLI and tests added.

title: Scaffold artifact builder repo
description: Bootstrap lol-ddragon-context-artifact-builder with config, CLI entry, normalization logic, and artifact layout aligned to Project Brain decisions.
notes: Ran tests: python3 -m unittest discover -s tests (OK).
close_reason: Scaffold complete; initial CLI, normalization, tests, and README added.
